author: draganrakita
content: Have made PR that introduces runtime cost and splits previous gas function intro intrinsic and runtime: https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/pull/11844 pls take a look

author: misilva73
content: Left a couple comments. The main one is about the addition of the WARM_COST pre-charge. I am not sure I see the point in that. That will then chnage a lot of the remaining changes, so I wnated to settle that one before sontinuing the review

author: draganrakita
content:
I wanted to be accurate about it, and the gas for warm/cold is considered. This means that if target/to address is already in auth_list/access_list we will not charge additional cost for warming. 

Initial version of eip2780 did this as part of intrinsic gas this meant fetching state and doing this inside txpool, if it is part of runtime it looked okay to me. We already need to add cold/warm cost if target/to is delegate.
